reviews.title: Mediocre rundown place
reviews.text:
The place was an disapointment.
All the noise from the corridors got in the room, loudly. 
The staffs are not helpful at all, always take No as the first response. Double bed changing? Of course no. We checked out at 7AM to join a tour, asked them to extend or give us a room to change when we got back. Of course no. Apparently they were fully booked, no checking needed, no apologies needed. A big No, in the face. Think about that given I booked the rooms just 1 day before arrival! Later we use the public bathroom to change. No hot water and the reception of course forgot to notify us at the first place!
The air ventilation fan in my room sounded like a horse but I was too fed up to ask (or beg, to be precisely) for a change.
The breakfast, they were out of gas when we asked for an omelet, twice. Minutes later we saw the next table having some omelet! Apparently I need to keep coming back to check their gas situation!
The only thing good about this is the location, but given the small city of Da Lat, I would totally recommend any better, newer places in town. I have been to Da Lat several times and this is by far the worst accomodation experience! I got better staff attitude even at homestay B&B! This place feels like other rundown state-own places, where the staffs give very little **** about customer service or the place's wellkeeping. Farewell, Golf 3 hotel.
reviews.positives: Location

reviews.title: Bien
reviews.positives: La gentillesse du personnel. L’emplacement. Le gardiennage de nos bagages jusqu’au soir pour notre départ à 17h. Le prix.
reviews.negatives: Le bruit mal insonorisé. Le petit déjeuner moyen.

reviews.title: I’m convinced they never cleaned our room when we first checked in
reviews.text:
We booked this hotel for a great location. The front desk staff was nice and welcoming. That was about as much pleasance I had at this hotel. 

Walking into the room, the showers were badly designed in a way that water would leak 100% of the time out of the shower whenever we showered.  

My partner said he noticed a stain on the bed when we came into the room( and didn’t bother to tell me). We left it there and the next day it was still there. This tells me the staff never bothers cleaning the bed. I wouldn’t be surprised if they never changed the sheets before we came in. 

I noticed that the mini bar was completely empty when we checked in and was filled the next day. This tells me they never even bothered checking the rooms…

This place has no ventilation(ac or otherwise) the only thing it had was a loud fan that sounds like it’s about to die. We had to endure it because it was super hot in the room and opening the windows would make the  noise from the outside even more unbearable. 

Speaking of noise, the insulation was absolute trash.  We had a hard time getting a good night of rest with all the noise outside. No matter how much we closed the windows, the sound would just permeate through. 

The bed was completely uncomfortable at best. We both woke up several times in the night because the bed was so bad. 

Overall this is probably one of the worst hotels we booked in this trip. While I loved dalat, nothing about this hotel was pleasant. Just stay away. Far away.

reviews.title: Great location but disappointing facilities
reviews.text:
Overall a poor and disappointing experience staying here.

Pros
- Fantastic location.  Walking out of the hotel lands you smack in the middle of the night market.  Right in the city centre making it easy to get to pretty much anywhere.
- Umbrella service from bell staff is a nice touch when it rains

Cons
- There is no fitness centre, even though on Agoda the hotel says there is one.  This was really important to me and my partner as we enjoy working out in the mornings and will only book hotels with gym facilities.  Highly disappointed at this false advertising
- The air conditioning of the room was not adjustable so you're at the mercy of whatever the hotel staff thinks is the right temperature
- Bathroom design was poor and results in the floor being really wet after a shower, regardless of how you position the shower curtains
- Room curtains didn't block the bright morning sun even though it was fully drawn
- Room service food was abysmal

reviews.title: Stinky and in desperate need of a remodel
reviews.text: This hotel is located in a great area of Da Lat you can walk right out the front door and be at the night market. There are also many shops and restaurants around when the market is closed. I have no idea how they rate themselves 4 stars when the hotel smells like a convalescent home! The carpet in the room was old, disgusting and looked liked it hadn't been vacuumed in ages. The hot water in the shower would go out after a few minutes and go ice cold. There is no A/C and everything in the hotel is super old. The gym is a joke, the equipment is older than me and the entire hotel looks so old that everything has that 70's yellow tint on it. I do not recommend this hotel especially for the price.

reviews.title: First time in Da Lat
reviews.text:
Pro: Excellent location for night shopping and Cho Da Lat. Downtown attractions. Staff: Outstanding services from main lobby/doorbell to servers at breakfast buffet. Except for the check out. We wanted to pay for everything the night before due to early flights next morning; we could not. It was very inconvenient rushing everything at 5am. This is not a 4 - star standard hotel service
Cleanness: Ok. Decently clean. Atmosphere: Room needs improvement. All looks dated, lot of marks. Curtain is not wide enough to cover the whole window; morning light may bothersome. Lights in the room are not bright enough when needed. Even there are still fluorescent tube light. Bed is very hard/not comfort comparing to Dendro Gold hotel in Nha Trang that we stayed earlier that week. IMO, since I traveled a lot in the USA, This hotel needs  improvement to earned  or be consider as 4 start hotel per USA standard,  likes Hilton..ect..

reviews.title: 2N stay @ Golf 3 Hotel
reviews.text: I had a 2 Night stay at Golf 3 hotel in Da Lat. The first thing we noticed was that they did not have air conditioning. If the weather was cooling it would have been no problem, but at this time of year you could feel the heat even in the morning. The room walls were also not very thick, you could hear your neighbours talking if they raised their voices a little. DO NOT try the massage even if you get attracted by the price. It's unprofessional, masseuse requests tips, not really comfortable to say the least.  The staff at the hotel were were both good and bad. As we needed tips on where to go and what to do in Da Lat, they did help to give us suggestions and directions even arranged cabs for us. Nevertheless, on the day we checked out, one of my friends left a T-shirt in the room. As our flight was in the evening, we came and went from the hotel till late afternoon. Even after clearing the room, they did not return us or notify us of the T-shirt. This we only realized upon arriving home.  On the upside, the price of this hotel has to be one of the cheapest 4 stars around, while the location is excellent. Walking out you find yourself straight in the middle of Da Lat night market - A must go destination.

reviews.title: Central but a little noise
reviews.text:
We stayed in Dalat for four nights as part of a six week tour of Vietnam. The choice of up-market hotels in Dalat is limited, so we opted for Golf 3. The hotel is situated in the city centre, with a lot of people and traffic from early morning (6 AM) to late evening. This makes for a facinating experience, but also a lot of noise. Rooms have no aircon, and with the windows open the noise becomes a nuicance. 

The choise of european food at breakfast was very limited. 

The spa treatment seemed little professional.

Dalat is a very beautiful place, and very different from the coastal areas. There are a lot of tourists, but surprisingly few europeans/western people.
reviews.positives: Central, reasonable price
reviews.negatives: Noisy, limited choise for breakfast, a little worn down

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.negatives: Cửa sổ không an toàn

reviews.title: GOLF 3 OK
reviews.text: I took an overnight trip to Dalat without my husband (he was very comfortable on the beach).  I wanted a nice hotel in the middle of town.  Golf 3 was the only "non backpacker" one I could find online.  It is a HUGE empty hotel, so it was a bit eerie on my own.  The breakfast was the worst I had in my 30 day stay in Vietnam.  The location was great, as it's just a block away from the market and heaps of good restaurants.  I saw plenty of nice modern hotels around that I could've stayed in, though.  They might have been a little more expensive, but worth it for one night.
reviews.positives: Location, comfortable bed
reviews.negatives: Empty "cold" hotel, breakfast buffet was average

reviews.title: TTC Dalat 04 Nguyen Thi Minh Khai
reviews.text:
The hotel is close to the night market, great location. Decent amenities. Everything was okay until I stayed on the second night when the staff called to inform me that I needed to check out for another guest; I confirmed that I had booked and paid for three nights and suggested the hotel check again, but this person insisted that I needed to verify.  
After checking my email from Agoda, I contacted the hotel again and the staff just said, "Oh let me check again... ah I was mistaken, you can stay another night," without any apology.  
Then, when I returned to my room that afternoon and the key card wouldn’t open the door, I went down to the reception to inquire and the staff said, "Oh, your card was locked because of the extra night."  
The hotel needs to pay more attention to its staff.

reviews.title: Very comfortable stay

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text:
hotel right in the middle of everything. markets just up the road. lake about 5min walk away. close to some good places to eat.
breakfast was good, varied selection. plenty of good places to visit. we used easy riders with a car (more comfortable than a motorbike)
overall dalat is a beautiful place to visit, quite cool compared to other places in vietnam, which was a nice change.
reviews.positives: Comfortable beds, and good sized room

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text:
this is a second time for me to stay here.
At the first time, I love the location and the excellent breakfast That's why I came back for 2nd time, but I was so disappointed about my buffet breakfast, food was so less and cold..
reviews.positives: this hotel is located in the center of Da Lat, walking distance to market and beautiful lake.The room is nice and clean, the price is reasonable too.
reviews.negatives: The buffet breakfast was so poor. I was so disappointed ...
